allow: Bash(find src/app/pages -name "*.tsx" -exec sed -i '' 's/min-h-screen bg-background bg-background/min-h-screen bg-background/g' {} +)

Bash(find src/app/admin -name '*.tsx' -exec sed -i '' -e 's/text-\\[#18181B\\]/text-foreground/g' -e 's/text-\\[#3F3F46\\]/text-foreground/g' -e 's/text-\\[#71717A\\]/text-muted-foreground/g' -e 's/text-\\[#52525B\\]/text-muted-foreground/g' -e 's/text-\\[#A1A1AA\\]/text-muted-foreground/g' -e s/text-gray-400/text-muted-foreground/g -e s/text-gray-500/text-muted-foreground/g -e s/text-gray-600/text-muted-foreground/g -e s/text-gray-700/text-foreground/g -e 's/border-\\[#E5E7EB\\]/border-border/g' -e 's/border-\\[#F0F0F0\\]/border-border\\/40/g' -e 's/border-\\[#D1D5DB\\]/border-input/g' -e 's/border-\\[#D4D4D8\\]/border-border/g' -e 's/border-\\[#E4E4E7\\]/border-border/g' -e 's/bg-\\[#F4F4F5\\]/bg-muted/g' -e 's/bg-\\[#FAFAFA\\]/bg-muted\\/50/g' -e 's/bg-\\[#18181B\\]/bg-foreground/g' -e 's/lg:hover:bg-\\[#F4F4F5\\]/lg:hover:bg-muted/g' -e 's/lg:hover:bg-\\[#FAFAFA\\]/lg:hover:bg-muted\\/50/g' -e s/text-red-600/text-destructive/g '{}' +)
Bash(find src/app/pages src/app/components src/app/admin -name '*.tsx' -exec sed -i '' -e s/bg-background/bg-white/g '{}' +)

Bash(find src/app/pages src/app/components src/app/admin -name '*.tsx' -exec sed -i '' -e s/bg-green-600/bg-primary/g -e 's/lg:hover:bg-green-700/lg:hover:bg-primary\\/90/g' -e s/text-green-600/text-primary/g -e s/text-green-700/text-primary/g -e 's/bg-green-50/bg-primary\\/5/g' -e s/lg:hover:text-black/lg:hover:text-foreground/g -e s/text-black/text-foreground/g '{}' +)

Bash(python3 -c " import re, glob for f in sorted\(glob.glob\('src/app/pages/*.tsx'\) + glob.glob\('src/app/components/*.tsx'\)\): with open\(f\) as fh: content = fh.read\(\) for m in re.finditer\(r'<Button\\b\([^>]*?\)>', content\): attrs = m.group\(1\) if 'variant=' not in attrs and 'className=' in attrs and 'type=\\"submit\\"' not in attrs: line = content[:m.start\(\)].count\('\\n'\) + 1 short = attrs.strip\(\)[:80] print\(f'{f}:{line}: {short}'\) ")
Bash(sed -i '' 's/px-4 py-2 rounded-full text-sm/px-4 py-2.5 min-h-\\[44px\\] rounded-full text-sm/' src/app/pages/Faq.tsx)
Bash(sed -i '' 's/px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full text-xs/px-3.5 py-2 min-h-\\[44px\\] rounded-full text-xs/' src/app/pages/Points.tsx)
Bash(sed -i '' 's/border border-border rounded-lg px-4 py-2/border border-border rounded-lg px-4 py-2.5 min-h-\\[44px\\]/' src/app/pages/NoticeDetail.tsx)

Bash(python3 -c " import re, glob count = 0 for f in sorted\(glob.glob\('src/app/admin/*.tsx'\)\): with open\(f\) as fh: content = fh.read\(\) for m in re.finditer\(r'<Button\\b\([^>]*?\)>', content\): attrs = m.group\(1\) if 'variant=' not in attrs and 'className=' in attrs: cn = re.search\(r'className=\\"\([^\\"]+\)\\"', attrs\) if cn and any\(p in cn.group\(1\) for p in ['text-muted', 'text-foreground', 'lg:hover:bg-muted', 'border border-']\): count += 1 print\(f'Admin variant-less buttons: {count}'\) " echo "")

Bash(sed -i '' 's/mb-2 text-lg font-medium text-foreground">{t\('"'"'upload.dropzoneTitle'"'"'\)}/mb-2 text-sm font-medium text-foreground">{t\('"'"'upload.dropzoneTitle'"'"'\)}/g' src/app/pages/Upload.tsx)
Bash(sed -i '' 's/text-base text-muted-foreground mb-8/text-sm text-muted-foreground mb-8/g' src/app/pages/Onboarding.tsx)
Bash(sed -i '' 's/text-base font-semibold mb-2 sm:mb-3/text-sm font-semibold mb-2 sm:mb-3/g' src/app/pages/About.tsx)
Bash(sed -i '' 's/text-base font-bold text-foreground mb-2/text-sm font-bold text-foreground mb-2/g' src/app/pages/Events.tsx)
Bash(sed -i '' 's/mb-2 text-base font-semibold text-white/mb-2 text-sm font-semibold text-white/g' src/app/components/WorkDetailModal.tsx)
Bash(sed -i '' "551s/.*/<div className=\\"flex flex-col\\" style={{ gap: \\`\\${contentSpacing}px\\` }}>/" src/app/pages/Upload.tsx)
